maintainer_environment.notes: Automated installer smoke passes for all registered platforms. Manual E2E status is tracked separately because many agent runtimes require interactive accounts, GUIs, or vendor-specific environments.

agents.evidence: Portable bundle installs and verifies; no native Agent Skills runtime E2E recorded.
